lobby_cta: Enter the code on your phone
waiting_for_opponent: Waiting for the opponent to connect
deploy_select_unit: Select a unit for this battle
deploy_place_unit: Place the unit on the battlefield
battle_roll_dice: roll the dice on your phone!
cancel_game: Do you really want to end the battle?
bonus_unit_advantage: {name} gained the Circle of Power advantage through unit selection.
bonus_loc_advantage: {name} gained the Terrain advantage through a well-chosen position.
bonus_loc_disadvantage: {name} has a Terrain disadvantage due to an unfavorable position.
minigame_initiative: {name} gained initiative and will attack first.
minigame_dmg_cta: {name}, step up to the TV and play the attack bonus minigame.
minigame_def_cta: {name}, step up to the TV and play the defence bonus minigame.
minigame_dmg_fail: {name} did not gain the attack bonus.
minigame_def_fail: {name} did not gain the defence bonus.
battle_unit_retry: {name} uses the Circle of Power and can attack again!
battle_life_retry: {name} uses Field Dressing and survives the attack!
